CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, '中国'), (2, '日本'), (3, '中国文化'), (4, '文化中国'), (5, '中文'), (6, '英语');
SELECT id, value FROM test_strings WHERE startsWithUTF8(value, '\xe4');
SELECT id, value FROM test_strings WHERE startsWithUTF8(value, '中国') AND id > 1;
SELECT id, value FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_strings WHERE startsWithUTF8(value, '\xe4')) AS temp WHERE id < 5;
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.id FROM test_strings AS t1 JOIN test_strings AS t2 ON startsWithUTF8(t1.value, t2.value) WHERE t2.value = '中';
SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_strings WHERE startsWithUTF8(value, (SELECT value FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2));
SELECT t1.id, COUNT(*) FROM test_strings AS t1 JOIN test_strings AS t2 ON startsWithUTF8(t1.value, '\xe4') GROUP BY t1.id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT id, value FROM test_strings WHERE startsWithUTF8(value, '') OR startsWithUTF8(value, '\xe5') AND id IN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE id < 4);
